name: Money In / Out
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can maintain accurate cash drawer records through Money In/Out functionality in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " POS, which enables tracking non-sales cash movements like expenses, petty cash, or bank deposits. This cash management capability helps retail operators maintain accurate till balances and support financial accountability, with effective money in/out tracking typically improving cash reconciliation accuracy and reducing discrepancies across Australian retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Money In/Out functionality in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " enables retail operators to record cash drawer adjustments with proper documentation and tracking, helping ensure accurate end-of-day reconciliation and supporting audit trails. This cash tracking helps ensure your retail operations maintain accurate cash records while supporting financial accountability and simplifying daily cash-up processes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Money In / Out feature allows you to track banking and petty cash withdrawals. Any amount you withdraw from the till using the Money In / Out feature will automatically reduce the expected amount in the till when you perform a Cash Up."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Before you begin"}], "data-id": "before-you-begin"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before you can use the Money In/Out feature you will need to ensure you have configured the appropriate Security Permissions"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open Back Office"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Staff > Users > POS Security Features", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose the "}, {"text": "Security Profile", "bold": true}, {"text": " you want to allow access to Money Out"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "All staff users assigned to this profile will have the same access"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Look for the option titled ?Function ? I have taken $1000 in cheque payments today but banked $500 of that using Money Out, the Amount Expected will be $500."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In  "}, {"text": "Step 4 ?
